stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes what is the required trip fuel for a turbine engine jet aircraft? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Taxi fuel: 240 kg
APU consumption: 100 kg
Take-off and climb fuel: 1550 kg
Cruise fuel flow: 2820 kg/h
Cruise time: 2 h 45 min
Descent and Landing fuel: 280 kg
Contingency fuel: 5% or 5 min
Alternate fuel: 2200 kg
Final reserve fuel: 1100 kg
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
